title: Add ICTRP/CTIS/ISRCTN ingest + cross-registry dedup
context: M2 broadens coverage beyond ClinicalTrials.gov to WHO ICTRP, EU CTIS/EudraCT, and ISRCTN using open fields only, gated on the verified License Register. Cross-registry duplicates are deduped by cross-registration IDs and tracked in a coverage ledger. PII drop, hashing, and version capture apply per source; sources with unclear terms are excluded.
objective: Add ingest for WHO ICTRP, EU CTIS/EudraCT, and ISRCTN (open fields only) and dedupe cross-registry duplicates by cross-registration IDs into a coverage ledger.
acceptanceCriteria: Adds ingest for WHO ICTRP, EU CTIS/EudraCT, and ISRCTN using open fields only, gated on License Register approval.
Cross-registry duplicates deduped by cross-registration IDs; coverage ledger updated.
PII drop, source-text hashing, and registry-version capture applied per source.
Sources with unclear terms are excluded; no secrets written to logs.
